==== /.src/test.tsx (0 errors) ====
    // Regression test: JSX intrinsic elements must not produce TS2304
    // "Cannot find name" errors when the Effect plugin is enabled.
    export const view = () => <div>Hello</div>
    
    export const nested = () => (
      <div>
        <span>World</span>
      </div>
    )
